case_title: MEGAN SUE BELEFONTE VS. FRANK PARSONS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $985.00 FILED BY BELEFONTE, MEGAN SUE AS TO DEFENDANT PARSONS, FRANK DBA PARSONS FAMILY TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MEGAN SUE BELEFONTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANK PARSONS IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED FEB-04-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARSONS, FRANK DBA PARSONS FAMILY TRUST
DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELEFONTE, MEGAN SUE
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELEFONTE, MEGAN SUE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BELEFONTE, MEGAN SUE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELEFONTE, MEGAN SUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARSONS, FRANK DBA PARSONS FAMILY TRUST $650.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MEGAN SUE BELEFONTE-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS
